acceptance_criteria: All relationship states correctly reflected; multiple IDs returned in order; unknown IDs return all-false; domain_blocking reflected
description:
Return Relationship objects for given account IDs (id[] query param, multiple allowed). Fields: id, following, showing_reblogs, notifying, followed_by, blocking, blocked_by, muting, mute_notifications, requested, domain_blocking, endorsed. Look up each from follows, followers, domain_blocks tables.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to test /api/v1/accounts/relationships against mastodon.social with various relationship states and document the exact response structure.

Test discipline:
- Following: returns following=true, showing_reblogs=true
- Pending follow: returns requested=true, following=false
- Domain blocked: returns domain_blocking=true
- Multiple IDs in request: returns array in same order as input
- Unknown ID: returns relationship with all false values (NOT 404)

Defensive programming:
- IDs that don't exist return relationships with all false (Mastodon behavior — not 404)
- blocked_by requires checking if any of the target's blocks apply to us — complex query, test carefully
title: GET /api/v1/accounts/relationships: following, followed_by, blocking, requested
